summary: Completed testing of LinkedIn Profile Integration and Review Functionality. All features working correctly: LinkedIn URL field in registration, LinkedIn button display (blue when linked, gray when not), review submission with star rating, duplicate review prevention, and self-review prevention.
passed_tests: 1. Backend: POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Creates professional with linkedin_url field - PASS
2. Backend: GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/{id} - Returns linkedin_url in response - PASS
3. Backend: POST /api/matchmaker/professionals/{id}/review - Submits review with rating 1-5 - PASS
4. Backend: POST /api/matchmaker/professionals/{id}/review - Prevents duplicate reviews (400 error) - PASS
5. Backend: POST /api/matchmaker/professionals/{id}/review - Prevents self-review (400 error) - PASS
6. Backend: GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/{id}/review-status - Returns can_review, has_reviewed, is_own_profile - PASS
7. Backend: Review rating clamped to 1-5 range - PASS
8. UI: LinkedIn input field in registration form (Step 1 - Basic Info) - PASS
9. UI: LinkedIn input has data-testid='linkedin-input' - PASS
10. UI: LinkedIn field marked as (Optional) - PASS
11. UI: LinkedIn button (blue) displayed for profile WITH LinkedIn URL - PASS
12. UI: LinkedIn button (gray/disabled) displayed for profile WITHOUT LinkedIn URL - PASS
13. UI: LinkedIn button has data-testid='linkedin-button' (active) and 'linkedin-button-disabled' (inactive) - PASS
14. UI: Write Review button displayed with data-testid='write-review-btn' - PASS
15. UI: Review dialog opens with star rating selection - PASS
16. UI: Star rating buttons have data-testid='star-rating-1' through 'star-rating-5' - PASS
17. UI: Clicking stars updates selected rating - PASS
18. UI: LinkedIn shown in Contact Information section when URL provided - PASS
19. UI: LinkedIn NOT shown in Contact Information when URL not provided - PASS
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_linkedin_review.py - Created new test file for LinkedIn and Review features
test_credentials: Test users created via mongosh and cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test professionals created for UI testing (prof_ui_linkedin_test, prof_ui_no_linkedin_test) - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: LinkedIn and Review features fully functional. Key test IDs: linkedin-input (registration form), linkedin-button (active profile), linkedin-button-disabled (no LinkedIn), write-review-btn, star-rating-1 through star-rating-5. Route for professional profile is /matchmaker/profile/:professionalId (not /matchmaker/professional/). Review endpoints: POST /matchmaker/professionals/{id}/review, GET /matchmaker/professionals/{id}/review-status.

registration_form.description: LinkedIn URL input field in Step 1 (Basic Info)

profile_display_with_linkedin.description: Blue LinkedIn button next to professional name when URL provided

profile_display_without_linkedin.description: Gray/disabled LinkedIn button when URL not provided

contact_information.description: LinkedIn shown in Contact Information section when URL provided

duplicate_prevention.description: Returns 400 error when user tries to review same professional twice
duplicate_prevention.error_message: You have already reviewed this professional. Each user can only submit one review per professional.

self_review_prevention.description: Returns 400 error when user tries to review own profile
self_review_prevention.error_message: You cannot review your own profile

ui_review_dialog.description: Review dialog with star rating selection

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/{id}/r: Returns review status for current user
